languages.text: На этих плантациях плоды и зерно пропускают через мириады очистителей и молотилок, подвергают ферментации и дистилляции, чтобы в итоге получить крепкий и чистый амасек.

traits.locale_text: На этих плантациях плоды и зерно пропускают через мириады очистителей и молотилок, подвергают ферментации и дистилляции, чтобы в итоге получить крепкий и чистый амасек.
На этих плантациях плоды и зерно пропускают через мириады очистителей и молотилок, подвергают ферментации и дистилляции, чтобы в итоге получить крепкий и чистый амасек.

languages.text: On these fundi, fruit and grain are processed by a myriad of purifiers and threshing machines, fermented and distilled in large vats in order to finally get strong and pure amasec.
languages.original_text: На этих плантациях плоды и зерно пропускают через мириады очистителей и молотилок, подвергают ферментации и дистилляции, чтобы в итоге получить крепкий и чистый амасек.

traits.locale_text: Tons of fruits and grain are deseeded and turned into pulp which is then fermented and distilled in large vats. The resulting liquor is called amasec.
Tons of fruits and grain are deseeded and turned into pulp which is then fermented and distilled in large vats. The resulting liquor is called amasec.
On these fundi, fruit and grain are processed by a myriad of purifiers and threshing machines, fermented and distilled in large vats in order to finally get strong and pure amasec.

On these fundi, fruit and grain are processed by a myriad of purifiers and threshing machines, fermented and distilled in large vats in order to finally get strong and pure amasec.

languages.text: Auf diesen Fundi werden Früchte und Getreide durch eine Vielzahl von Reinigungs- und Dreschmaschinen verarbeitet, vergoren und in großen Fässern destilliert, um schließlich starken und reinen Amasec zu erhalten.
languages.original_text: On these fundi, fruit and grain are processed by a myriad of purifiers and threshing machines, fermented and distilled in large vats in order to finally get strong and pure amasec.

traits.locale_text: Auf diesen Fundi werden Früchte und Getreide durch eine Vielzahl von Reinigungs- und Dreschmaschinen verarbeitet, vergoren und in großen Fässern destilliert, um schließlich starken und reinen Amasec zu erhalten.

languages.text: Sur ces fundi, les fruits et les céréales sont traités par une myriade de purificateurs et de batteuses, fermentés et distillés dans de grandes cuves afin d'obtenir enfin un amasec fort et pur.
languages.original_text: On these fundi, fruit and grain are processed by a myriad of purifiers and threshing machines, fermented and distilled in large vats in order to finally get strong and pure amasec.

traits.locale_text: Sur ces fundi, les fruits et les céréales sont traités par une myriade de purificateurs et de batteuses, fermentés et distillés dans de grandes cuves afin d'obtenir enfin un amasec fort et pur.

languages.text: En estos fundi, la fruta y el grano son procesados por una miríada de purificadores y trilladoras, fermentados y destilados en grandes cubas para obtener finalmente un amasec fuerte y puro.
languages.original_text: On these fundi, fruit and grain are processed by a myriad of purifiers and threshing machines, fermented and distilled in large vats in order to finally get strong and pure amasec.

traits.locale_text: En estos fundi, la fruta y el grano son procesados por una miríada de purificadores y trilladoras, fermentados y destilados en grandes cubas para obtener finalmente un amasec fuerte y puro.

languages.text: Bu fundi'lerde meyve ve tahıl sayısız arıtıcı ve harman makinesi tarafından işlenir, fermente edilir ve sonunda güçlü ve saf amasec elde etmek için büyük fıçılarda damıtılır.
languages.original_text: On these fundi, fruit and grain are processed by a myriad of purifiers and threshing machines, fermented and distilled in large vats in order to finally get strong and pure amasec.

traits.locale_text: Bu fundi'lerde meyve ve tahıl sayısız arıtıcı ve harman makinesi tarafından işlenir, fermente edilir ve sonunda güçlü ve saf amasec elde etmek için büyük fıçılarda damıtılır.
